auth.welcome_desc: Log in to your account to continue.
auth.register_desc: Create your account to start sending or transporting parcels safely.
auth.terms_accept: I accept the Terms of Use and Wasitni's privacy policy.
auth.terms_accept_end: and the privacy policy of Wasitni.
auth.error_password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.verify_email_desc: We have sent a confirmation link to the address provided. Please click on this link to activate your account.
auth.spam_hint: Check your spam folder or make sure the email address is correct.
auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter the email address associated with your account and we will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.error_too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.verify_code_desc: We have sent a 6-digit confirmation code to your email address. Please enter it below to continue.
auth.error_invalid_otp: The code entered is incorrect or has expired.
auth.otp_attempts_exceeded: Too many failed attempts. The code has been invalidated. Please request a new one.
